uploads_base_path.description: Filesystem path where uploaded images are stored

uploads_base_url.description: Public URL prefix for serving uploaded images

max_file_size_bytes.description: Maximum allowed upload file size in bytes (default: 10 MB)

allowed_mime_types.description: Comma-separated list of allowed image MIME types

default_robots.description: Default robots meta value applied to new pages

default_language.description: Default language code applied to new pages

posts_per_page.description: Default page size for public post listings

scheduled_publish_interval_seconds.description: How often the scheduled-publish tick runs (seconds)

public_base_url.description: Absolute site root for RSS feed channel + fallback item permalinks

rss_item_limit.description: Maximum number of items in an RSS feed
